フキダシアイコンの消去
It was the day when around 1/3rd of our summer had ended.
I was studying hard, as usual.
That should be enough for today... I thought, while strentching out
as I decided to call it for the day.
I wonder what Shino's doing? It's late night, wonder if she's
sleeping or if she's still up playing games....
As I was thinking that... suddenly the urge to hear her voice overtook me.
As soon as I got permission, I called her. It's at times like these
that the soundproofing around my father's room came in handy.
Yaho~, what's up? It's pretty late, you know.
"I mean, I don't exactly have a good reason but like..."
As I hesitated to say the real reason, I heard her incredulous voice.
What~? Sounds kinda suspicious. Tell me the real reason, mister~
The reason I called you is...
I wanted to hear your voice
I wanted to hear your voice
You know, I wanted to... hear your voice too, \n[1].
I told her that it went great today, and heard her cheery laughter in return.
Eheheh--. Mine too. I'm doing my best... at what I can.
Hey, \n[1]. Let's do our best together, okay? I'm gonna cut the call now.
I put the phone down, then sat down at my desk again.
I mean, when your girl says that to you... What can you do except work harder?
I faced the other wall, and mumbled.
